description.en: Responsible for creating and maintaining desktop applications.
description.zh: 负责创建和维护桌面应用程序。

description.en: Gained industrial experience as a web developer and worked on enhancing exisitng services in app using Angular and TypeScript.
description.zh: 获得了作为网页开发者的工业经验，并在应用程序中使用Angular和TypeScript增强了现有服务。

description.en: Student project, involved in the raising awareness and development of Internet of Things applications through Microsoft Azure.
description.zh: 学生项目，通过Microsoft Azure参与物联网应用的宣传和开发。

description.en: Specialized in SACE Year 12 Accounting and Maths.
description.zh: 专注于SACE12年级会计和数学。
